channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: The LINK token has value — 164 replies — 656.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
The LINK token has value

Open thread • Replies: 164 • Updated: 2026-05-08 20:30 UTC

OP

The LINK token has value

Early replies (first 3)

62176216
New Chainlink report
https://bitwiseinvestments.com/crypto-market-insights/chainlink-in-plain-english

62176226
>>62176214
>In many cases, nodes must stake LINK before they can provide and be compensated for their services. If they provide incorrect data, they are penalized and lose a portion of the LINK they have staked. This system helps ensure the integrity of Chainlink’s services while also
reducing the free-floating supply of LINK.
Speaking in present tense. I assume this and the and the other clues we've seen in the past couple weeks mean staking imminent?

62176244
>>62176226
What other clues

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62205315
>>62205259
Why are there 10 daily fud threads? Especially for a "2017 dead coin", as nigerian fudders say

62205338
>>62204983
right. Chainlink has lots of products that are obviously useful to the blockchain space.

62205439
>>62205315
why do you keep swapping ids sar?

62205557
>>62205338
tnn

62205861
>>62204670
>the proof of off-chain payments is the chainlink reserve, the partnerships, you don't need exact numbers
actually I do, and unfortunately the things you've listed do not constitute as "proof of off-chain payments"
you're extremely bad at your job (shilling crapLINK)

62205868
>>62204983
great, any on-chain proof involving the LINK token and these entities?

62205875
>>62205109
>the paid shill is allowed to post mp4s outside of /gif/
kek, I didn't even realize this
literally smoking gun that moderation actively allows Chainlink shilling

62205959
>>62205868
All services always use nodes, and all nodes always use tokens. Since the tokens live and move 100% onchain you can see it all happen there.

>>62205259
>you're in all of them
Pretty sure that's you.

62206026
>>62205861
you can ask Chainlink for the exact numbers of their business deals. If they say yes, share it here too!
>>62205868
yes, follow this person on X they show on chain transactions of partnerships happening!
https://x.
com/0xGachoCCIP/status/2025566998332051824

62206129
>>62205959
I see nothing but testnets and zero-value txts
https://ccip.chain.link/msg/0x4c12d7472968072fd1fe6f459bb6bca1feda537fcac95679b2829faa8f12a91a
>>62206026
great, at least you've finally conceded that no such proof of their grandiose claims exists, it's purely "trust me bro"
>follow this person on X
the only thing this guy posts is testnet txs which amount to nothing tangible
as it stands, it seems that nobody is actually using LINK for anything
feel free to prove me wrong with actual txs or anything really

62206164
>>62206129
>I see nothing but testnets and zero-value txts
The Link t0k3n is not on any testnet. You're a liar.

62206205
>>62206164
okay bro show me the actual txs then, why the fuck is that so difficult for you?

62206453
>>62206205
Transactions for what? Node payments? How retarded are you?

62206464
>>62206453
notice how the shill instead of providing basic on-chain proof resorts to insults immediately
unhinged

62206529
>>62206464
Who are you talking to bub?

62206867
>>62205875
Holy fuck you people are retarded, mp4's have been available for a while now you just can't use audio on non /gif/ boards. I really can't tell if the people fudding are this stupid or disingenuous. Surely they are all from ebaumsworld.

62206946
>>62206867
kek
>>62206129
>>62206205
>ask questions expect answers
>call everyone who tries to answer a shill
pick one

62206969
>>62206946
billions in value moving to chainlink

62207057
>>62206946
kek it's like he's mad at shills both for shilling, and for not shilling hard enough.

62207097
>>62206529
he demanded truth instead of trust, something chainlink is unable to provide

62207144
>>62176214
>>62176216
Attention all linkies, baggies and fourth industrial resolution shills reading this

Have you no shame, no decency, no morals or soul? If you stay your course and don't repent and turn away from your grievous sins, your souls are consigned to hell in the afterlife for your despicable, disgusting and evil acts in this life.

No one likes you, appreciates you, looks up to you, respects you, or can even stand you. Everyone hates and despises you and has nothing but disdain and contempt for you, even the genocidal tyrants whose eager enforcers and accessories in genocide and crimes against humanity you are. You are despicable evil. You are revolting to all decency and morality. You are a disgrace and a stain on history. You are foot soldiers and cruel attack dogs of murderous despots. Your names and memory will live in infamy. You will be pointed to as examples of the worst dregs of humanity

Linkies will stand trial at Nuremberg 2.0 and be hanged for their heinous complicity and accessory to genocide and crimes against humanity as well as their loyalty to genocidal tyrants.
Everyone alive to witness Nuremberg 2 will cheer your sentencing and rejoice at your execution. No one will come visit your graves, which will be nameless, or lay flowers for you there, not even your spouses, parents or children. They will be ashamed to have been related to you, married to you, descended from you or to have borne your name.

Stop. Think. Reconsider. Repent. Denounce Chainlink and ask for forgiveness for all the evil you have already committed.

Apologize to and ask for forgiveness from the innocent anons you've been oppressing, repressing and persecuting.
Resign or reverse course and help the resistance against the Great Reset which is unfolding while there is still time to make a difference and before you have even more innocent blood on your hands

62207187
>>62207097
Node payments are all on chain, how is that not truth?

Also, how many times have you typed this "truth over trust" line so far in the past years? Couple thousand?

62207249
>duuude just go check it all on the blockchain!!!!

umm ok, where is that

>duuuuuude are you serious, just read insert buzzword blog here

nah i'm good

if all that shit is so important, why doesn't the token go up

>duuude it's up a million % from the year 1896

oh but didn't those gains happen right at the beginning?

>duuuuude you should've bought then

yeah i dont have at time machine

>duuuuude y y yer a fudder!!!!

i just said what the actual price action was

>duuude do you even read the whitepapers??

yeah i skimmed it, it didnt say much. now what

>duuuude we won against layerzero

oh nice congrats
but how does that help the token again

>duuude y y yerrr brown!! (blocks)

62207426
>>62207249
>yeah i skimmed it, it didnt say much. now what
Try again later!
>>62207097
some people choose not to trust no matter how much truth you provide. Chainlink is making products that run in trustless environments for those people too

62207443
>>62207426
zk snarks have become trustless, not requiring trusted setup, but Chainlink says they take too long to setup for cross chain connections

62207489
>>62206946
>shamelessly sneaking in 2 extra zeros like that

62207526
>>62206946
you haven't given any answers
>>62207187
truth over trust is a Chainlink moto, are you schizophrenic?

62207598
>>62207526
your fud could use some work bro
take it from a pro like me

62207606
>>62207598
bro your shitposting might be funny at times, but ultimately it's always shitposting

62207650
https://x.com/LinkBoi777/status/2052815025828516032
WAGMI bros

item.title: I’ve been without work now for a few weeks and this is the saddest state of existance i’ve ever been in. — 79 replies — 179.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
I’ve been without work now for a few weeks and this is the saddest state of existance i’ve ever been in.

Open thread • Replies: 79 • Updated: 2026-05-08 20:16 UTC

OP

I’ve been without work now for a few weeks and this is the saddest state of existance i’ve ever been in. I’m just completely alone in my apartment with nothing important to do, lonely. I might as well not exist at all. It’s like i’m the biggest loser in high school or something. The people here who advocate for the NEET lifestyle must be some real freaks.

Early replies (first 3)

62201436
I am truly sorry to hear that you dont have anything meaningful to do in your life or have an identity besides being a wageslave. This is entirely a (you) problem

62201447
Apartment? Let me guess youre living in some shitty city surrounded by brown people in some shitty apartment and youre wondering why your life is shit. You need to fix your environment, you do not need to hypnotize yourself by working some bullshit job that you dont care about

62201460
>>62201428
I'm sorry to say that you've been brainwashed. If you can't do anything but work then you should kill yourself. Actually don't because we need people like you to do "important things" like putting our fries in the bag

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62202894
>>62202886
I’ve worked as a psychiatrist. How so?

62203008
>>62201969
>Oh noooo men can’t force with violence women into breeding with men they don’t find attractive anymore!
only low T men think this is a good thing

62203201
>>62203008
High T men don't even have to try to get women to sleep with them. Low T, ugly, poor, beta faggots are the ones that need to force women, kek.

62203328
It depends on your personality and other factors. For me I'm able to handle it usually but now I'm sick and it prevents me from doing the activities I liked to do as a neet. Feels like I'm waiting to die but it was relatively fun while it lasted. Too bad money couldn't save me in the end

62203501
>>62202019
Oh no its the insufferable doctor again that likely to discuss endlessly and is high on his intelligence but a typical midwit as most doctors.
>>62201969
>Oh noooo men can’t force with violence women into breeding with men they don’t find attractive anymore! Only low value men care about that. Do only low value men like neeting?
Classical strawman. Its not about forcing to breend. Its about changing incentives back to normal without propaganda and support from the government. Also its all about your face, not your "value". You would understand if you were not handsome.
>>62202041
Bullshit. These are 3 of 1000s of historical systems. And even these, britain was 100% based on race. rome too (barbarians) and the persians had words for "non aryans". So literally 100% wrong.
>>62201966
Vielleicht helfen die neuen Maßnahmen, mehr Geld für Rentner und Beamte und höhere Steuern. XD
Aber im Ernst es wird nur ein langsamer Abstieg. Zusammenbruch gibts nur bei Krieg oder sowas.

62203529
>>62203501
>Also its all about your face, not your "value". You would understand if you were not handsome.
Wrong. I should have said mostly, or its the basis. Of course status and money and character matter.

62203638
>>62201588
You kind of sound like a faggot

62204797
>>62203501
There were a lot of romaniced barbarians in the romam empire and they could work in high positions in rome. There are huge amount of multicultural empires in history and once again we’re all results of different populstions mixing. The german idea of a pure race is another too simple and short sighted ideology from back when people didn’t know just how much we are results of different populations mixing over time. Even germany isn’t one race but had celtic mixture in the south and slavic on the east. Britain was celtic and three different kinds of germanic. I’m not saying go full blanda upp but migration and multiculturalism has always existed. Sure you we can try to make the flow lesser but completely ending it is a pipe dream. And why should we? There are a lot of good immigrants. All in all it’s no excuse to think ”society is shit” unless you got mind broken by /pol/-propaganda.

62204835
>>62201428
Ahh goycattle Stockholm Syndrome. Have you read about the freed slaves after the Civil War who killed themselves?

62204853
The conclusion I have come to is that 99% of /biz/ is depressed and/or facing existential crisis.

62204867
>>62201428
The bad news: You are a brainless golem that can't do anything unless he's commanded to by someone else.
The good news: You're in good company, since this is most of humanity.

Now just go get another wagejob, wagegolem.

62205336
>>62204853
Sounds like it. Would be nice to have this discussion brought over to /lit/.

62205354
>>62201588
> without any reason for it
This is such short-term thinking. You may have a problem with instant gratification.
What’d you lose your job for and why are you shitposting about NEETs inserts of asking for advice on getting a job?

62205600
>>62201428
So this is what a natural slave feels like when he stop working. Thanks for the information.

62205607
>>62201428
>I’m just completely alone in my apartment with nothing important to do, lonely.
Start with the greeks.

62205631
>>62201588
>Yeah these are nice but ultimately i still feel fucking lonely
Ok i get it you are an extraverted type. That figures. Do you know that this board is one of the most introverted people place on the whole internet?
We introverts, especially INTJs, which is overepresented here, very much dislike social interaction, except perhaps with a few trusted friends. We don't really feel lonely ever, and even if we do sometimes, we prefer to feel lonely that being with normies.

62205702
>>62201588
>Women have a lot more sex with you when you work, especially if it’s a high status, high paying job.
This is the only reason i could envy high status wageslaves. But you have to be pretty up far in the hierarchy in a big company to have access to multiple pretty women wanting to spend "time" with you. Like a board member or a branch director in S&P 500 company. If you are a CEO of a small 50 people company, you'll have have a few MILF or young average and that's it. Something that can be done as a NEET.

62205726
>>62201428
>I love being a goodgoy wageslave
>the only value i have in life is what i provide to mr shekelberg
pathetic

62205752
>>62201436
/thread

62205758
>>62201612
>All in all this just feels fucking lonely, like how a very unpopular loser kid would live.
Boy WE were the losers. Not really because we didn't have any choice, but because we hated it, this society, school, from the start. We could have played the game, work at school, play the social hierarchy game, but it's something we depise. And don't get us wrong, not all, but many of us NEET introvers, will get way further in life than you ever will, doing what we do. The others who fail, will have a nice NEET life, free of hassle, or have a solitary job. You do you, we do us.

62205785
>>62202019
>Why do you want to assume my job? I’m a doctor.
That figure you allopathic scum. Disappointed i wouldn't have had a discussion with you if i knew this from the start as you are not even a real human.

62205905
>>62202878
Is it ever tiresome having to deal with self-inflicted conditions? Did you change your lifestyle from seeing what happens to others?

62206218
I feel ya, OP. I quit my job recently because it just sucked too much to keep doing it and I'd saved up a good bit of money, but it is rough how you have no structure throughout the day. If I was younger, I'd probably love it, but at a certain age, you've become familiar with most of life and it's hard to find novelty anymore. It's also hard to find ways to be helpful to others on your own.

What I'm doing though is working everyday on a project of my own. It's not easy, and I get frustrated every day, but progress is inevitable if you show up every day and put in the time. It's either work for yourself or work for someone else, both are difficult in their own ways, but you get to choose. I'd say make sure you try both before you decide how to spend your life.

62206367
>>62205600
>>62205607
>>62205631
>>62205702
>>62205758
>>62205785

Please stop posting. Nobody values your input/opinions.

62206531
>>62201428
If you're that desperate for a job just go do free volunteer work to put on your resume
>Inb4 the whole circular argument of "oh but that doesn't pay bills" into "I thought you wanted a job to have purpose tho" into "well I need to be making progress in life" normie bullshit

62206541
>>62202019
I do have animals. The point is that I get to choose how much I work. I could have more animals and do a lot more work but I choose not to. I could have employees but when I was an employee I decided that I would never want to become a boss and I would only work for myself. I used to be a welder for a motorhome company and after the great recession they were cutting hours for people and I decided I would just work 4 hours every day so some people could keep their hours and I realized 4 hours per day was perfect because I got the warm feeling of satisfaction without getting burnt out and tired.

Anyway my banker keeps wanting me to expand and my portfolio is worth almost as much as my dad's farm. I just don't want all the extra hassle I guess. I already grow enough food for 1,000 people and I think that should be enough for 1 person to do. I just want to work my 9 to noon and then cook lunch and play a round of golf.

62206649
>>62201428
you're not supposed to neet in some boring studio apartment
you're supposed to neet in your boomer parents' huge ass house

62206681
>>62205905
>Did you change your lifestyle from seeing what happens to others?

Yeah it has made me drink less and lose weight.

>Is it ever tiresome having to deal with self-inflicted conditions?

Majority of things that require treatment are partially self-inflicted. I don’t really judge because i don’t believe that people should live only for health.

62206763
>>62205785
Funny how much medicine always awakens emotion in people.

62207574
>>62204797
>but migration and multiculturalism has always existed.
Why do you repeat jewish lines. Migration from nonwhites to europe never existed. And Rome was maybe discutable, all your other "countless example" are not existing.

item.title: Bitcoin or altcoins? — 42 replies — 123.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
Bitcoin or altcoins?

Open thread • Replies: 42 • Updated: 2026-05-08 20:22 UTC

OP

If you had to pick, what would you buy right now: BTC or altcoins? I’m not seeing much ROI in alts lately, even utility or memecoins.

Early replies (first 3)

62195293
>>62195275
Bitcoin until 120k

62195300
you can't time the market I thought like >>62195293
last time, bitcoin to 70k and sell half and go into alts and then 2021 alts just fucking died for a year.

The alts that pumped are things that haven't gone parabolic yet, or big projects like Solana with glowie money attached to them. Ones like Link are not going to 1000 regardless of cope.

/biz/ will pretty much only give you bad info too. I've found maybe 3 coins here that were Guaranteed returns, everything else I had to research myself. In fact I remember last year posting proof that CRCL stock was going to 10x on IPO and got XRP schizos fudding me out of taking a life changing position.

I actually hate the fuck out of baggies.

62195373
>>62195293
Why 120k only?? Why not 1M?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62197558
>>62195854
And which altcoins?

62199876
>>62195895
That's what I'm telling as well

62200331
>>62197011
Pedo pedo

62200336
>>62195275
Just buy Link and avax

62200341
>>62195988
LINK buy. I will keep telling everyone to buy this

62200348
>>62195275
>Btc
Eth
link
Sui
Sol
Bonk
Neo

Rate my bags

62200350
I will go all in Solana because it the most popular plataform for tokens. If you want to rugpull then you will use Solana System.

Bitcoin can`t 5x in 2 years. There is not enough money in the market for that.

62201146
>>62200350
All in or bust

62201148
>>62200341
Then nerve

62201149
>>62195957
Ironically, eth might be useful if only because jews will push it back to 6k in the next cycle. From a 1500 bottom to 6k, that's 4x in guaranteed returns. if I had 300k in my pocket I'd probably pick eth.

62201348
>>62201149
Let my whale friend pump ETH

62201349
>>62200348
Neo is an old bag kek

62201352
>>62201149
Why eth? Why not btc

62202350
>>62201352
Do you hold BTC? If you’re into it, you can also stake it through protocols that let you keep self-custody.

62202675
>>62195957
Hey Vitalik

62204580
>>62202350
It's no longer possible now and is risky

62204588
but alts usually move hardest once liquidity rotates.

62204590
>>62195275
Depends on your risk tolerance honestly. BTC for stability, alts for asymmetric upside.

62204593
>>62204580
Stop wasting your time on defi shit. Hacks are rampant but if you want to lose money, go all in lmao

62204595
Alts feel dead until they suddenly aren’t

62205030
>>62202350
So far Babylon’s my choice here. I’m not really into wrapped versions, I prefer native BTC exposure.

62205406
>>62204595
So what's your plan?

62205510
>>62205030
Is it even safe. Too much trust we put in defi after all

62206142
>>62205510
Can’t even blame people after the last cycle. The whole point now is reducing trust assumptions as much as possible.

62206833
>>62204593
you just have to be selective

62206982
>>62206142
but if it's still centralized, that's nonsense to continue

62207106
>>62197558
UNI for dex, TAO for AI, both are really reliable to swing as well

KTA and REPPO are my 10x and 100x lottery tickets

and dca back to BTC should altseason indicators hit near 75%

62207486
>>62206982
Even for me, if someone else still controls it, I wouldn’t want to use it. Glad there are native options now while still keeping self-custody.

62207560
>>62207486
it's the product that will matter in the end and the users choice

62207604
>>62207106
Wake up. 100x is no longer exists

item.title: Day 1710 of snailposting every day until BTC is at 1M — 9 replies — 35.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
Day 1710 of snailposting every day until BTC is at 1M

Open thread • Replies: 9 • Updated: 2026-05-08 20:27 UTC

OP

Day 1710 of snailposting every day until BTC is at 1M

Early replies (first 3)

62196486
yaaaay

62196691
fake count kill yourself you treacherous fuck

62196747
Fake snailposter. But it doesnt matter because the real snailposter is a majordomo faggot anyway.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62197083
>>62195343
cute

62199219
>>62195343
cute snale

62201371
>>62196691
This

62202760
snol

62204295
>>62195343

62207630
sneeeeeeel

item.title: How do LINK niggers cope with the fact that they were bag holding for 6, but I repeat, SIX years and have nothing to sho… — 8 replies — 32.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
How do LINK niggers cope with the fact that they were bag holding for 6, but I repeat, SIX years and have nothing to sho…

Open thread • Replies: 8 • Updated: 2026-05-08 20:39 UTC

OP

How do LINK niggers cope with the fact that they were bag holding for 6, but I repeat, SIX years and have nothing to show for it?

Early replies (first 3)

62205213
I just keep moving forward

62205218
>>62205209
Literally no one has been holding this entire time, people buy when it is low and sell when it is high, rinse and repeat.
The hodl meme is not a thing.

62205224
yikes

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62205225
>>62205209
Not being a histrionic little bitch helps, a lot. It sometimes goes up, it sometimes goes down, and it always goes sideways one way or the other. Just like my other investments. Why fret?

I know I know, it must be hard to grasp as someone with unregulated emotions and frequent bouts of selfhate and loathing, but you too can learn to not give a fuck anon. Just work on yourself and your career.

62205264
>>62205225
>if you keep clinging on to a dead alt for almost a decade without ever re-evaluating the original thesis, you're "patient", otherwise you're a histrionic bitch!!!1
ngl impressive mental gymnastics

62205343
>>62205225
>it sometimes goes up, it sometimes goes down
Sometimes it's also, you know, fucking grows a little and not just goes back to levels it was at 6 years ago.
I know I know, it must be hard to cope as someone who holds LINK for years just to see Sirgay dump another fat stack of coins onto the market making every single baggie pay for it. But hey at least linkies get to work on themselves and their career, am I right? It's not like they have any other choice lmao.

62205783
>>62205343
>t. histrionic fag

62207686
>>62205783
>t. histrionic fag

item.title: If you had $40k in cash, what would you do with it right now? — 21 replies — 29.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
If you had $40k in cash, what would you do with it right now?

Open thread • Replies: 21 • Updated: 2026-05-08 20:00 UTC

OP

If you had $40k in cash, what would you do with it right now? Buy BTC/ETH/MSTR? Index funds?

Early replies (first 3)

62202892
>>62202877
I would do 1/3 in defi on Solana network, 1/3 in solana, 1/3 in MSTR

62202901
short-term bond funds

62202913
>>62202877
i would buy a tanga and wear it
feels great man

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62202944
>>62202877
buy general mills

62202967
>>62202877
I'd spend half of it to get all of the Sims 4 expansions and the other half on KMB shares.

62203065
>>62202967
Tch. Baby.

62203165
>>62202877

Buy $RKLB at any price below $70. Hold and you will far outgain any crypto.

62203186
>>62202877
I would buy intel

62203194
>>62203165
What makes you so bullish? Are you investing in any other space companies or just all in this one?
>>62203186
buy after it just went parabolic?

62203229
>>62202877
throw it at some 3% yield overnight account and wait for the correction.
after that it depends on what you want to do. I feel like the most braindead play (but which will objectively cost you a lot of profits) is to just throw it into the ACWI IMI, for a good spread over the world. that one is basically buy & ignore, it should even survive stress scenarios like China dethroning the US.
but, historically, you'll also probably only do 50% of what the S&P500 gets

62203232
>>62202877
either all in on a total market fund or 70% total market 15% growth stock 15% dividend stock if risk tolerant.

62203252
>>62203194

i'm only serious in RKLB.

stable competent leadership.
space systems + launch.
big demand.
proven and reliable success with Electron.
Neutron offers significant upside in what should be a growing market.
Plays nice with government and delivers.
valuation... if SpaceX is public between $1.5T and $2T... RKLB $100B+ seems a lock.

there's always risk. rocket stuff explodes, but I think the potential for 100%+ gain far outweighs a total loss.

62203271
>>62202877
STACK all of it into REITS and get a guaranteed 2k a year and watch that little bastard slowly appreciate overtime.

62203833
>>62202877
If you weren't part of the top 10% in 2025, you're lower class

62204844
Keep it in cash because 40k aint shit. Put it in a HYSA and get like 3.5%. You're going to make way more money figuring out a way to increase your income than gambling on some bullshit

62204847
>>62202877

item.title: /EBAY/ - We'll See What Happens Edition — 7 replies — 28.0/hr

/EBAY/ - We'll See What Happens Edition

Open thread • Replies: 7 • Updated: 2026-05-08 20:35 UTC

OP

>Basic Information
https://investor.gamestop.com/news-releases/news-details/2026/GameStop-Proposes-to-Acquire-eBay-at-125-00-Per-Share/

>Daily reminder
https://x.com/Almaadeed/status/2051283114345824713

>CNBC Interview
https://youtu.be/Bmj2PaxX24E?

>Mandatory study time
https://bbbwhy.com/

>eBay Investor Site
>SEC 10-K Annual report FY24 & '25 Proxy Statement
https://investors.ebayinc.com/overview/default.aspx

>Real-Time Trades
https://www.nasdaq.com/market-activity/stocks/ebay/latest-real-time-trades
>Current Trade Halts + Short Restrictions
nasdaqtrader.com/Trader.aspx?id=TradeHalts
nyse.com/markets/nyse-arca/notices

>Temporary alliance with reddit and Jaws to take down other sharks, we can go back to hating each other later
>reddit DDs don't take them for fact use your brain
>Check your broker and clearing house to ensure you're not rugpulled

First time on /EBAY/ !!

As always:
>sneed hedgies

Early replies (first 3)

62206865
>>62206727
kek

62206883
anyways, ebay isn't dumb enough to fall for it. if you hole ebay stock, it would be a god's right hand, but sadly ebay hates their own customers and shareholders that they'll just block the deal. Ebay is a much more larger company than gamestop which also means gamestop would have to add more shares diluting their own stock price. Ryan cohen is desperate, because his ship is sinking and they know it.

you can't refute any of this.

item.title: ARE YOU FUCKING KIDDING ME WITH THIS SHIT STOP SELLING HANTA IS A NOTHING BURGER 40% MORTALITY JUST MEANS THEY BURN OUT… — 62 replies — 24.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
ARE YOU FUCKING KIDDING ME WITH THIS SHIT STOP SELLING HANTA IS A NOTHING BURGER 40% MORTALITY JUST MEANS THEY BURN OUT…

Open thread • Replies: 62 • Updated: 2026-05-08 18:10 UTC

OP

ARE YOU FUCKING KIDDING ME WITH THIS SHIT
STOP SELLING
HANTA IS A NOTHING BURGER
40% MORTALITY JUST MEANS THEY BURN OUT BEFORE SPREADING FUCK
I LITERALLY JUST BOUGHT BACK

Early replies (first 3)

62202000
Fuck off retard

62202033
>>62201978
>“it is possible more cases will be reported” because it can be up to six weeks before those infected with the Andes variant of hantavirus show symptoms.

Lmao 40% mortality with SIX WEEKS to transmit it would fucking DESTROY humanity if it's even mildly transmissible without symptoms.

62202089
>>62202033
Bullish on Hanta? Truly a nothing burger though, this disease is likely less transmissible than herpes.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62204346
>>62203234
Yeah we have limited info but if the transmission window is long enough especially when someone infected is without symptoms or minimal symptoms and easy enough we're fucked.

I would begin buying up N100 masks as well as powerful UV C bulbs and all the other shit you wished you had during COVID NOW. It could be a nothingburger but I'd be ready.

62204414
>>62204078
Nigger you think I only have $3MM to my name?

62204452
I fucking hate waging so I welcome another lockdown.

62204459
>>62201978
Do you think a second lockdown scenario would be highly bullish for crypto like the last one was?

62204460
>>62204459
Yes.

Here's the play:
>OTM puts the moment you see second degree transmission (patient zero transmitted to person who transmitted to someone else)
>SELL as SOON as the President is about to speak
>All into crypto (BTC/XMR)

62204470
>>62204346
This isn't like Covid in one very important way - we have known about Hantavirus for a half century now (it was discovered during the Korean war), and we know about this specific south american strain of hanta.
The transmission window is extremely short, less than a day, and it's blatantly obvious when you're potentially infectious because you're running an extremely high fever. Also, even during that period of peak infectiousness it's still not terribly transmissible, most hanta virus outbreaks involve just a few people, and most of those turn out to have gotten it directly from rodent droppings. The outbreak in arizona back in the 90's for example came from infected rodents in a warehouse that stored canned sodas, and the dust from their droppings was getting onto the top of the cans and people were getting infected from drinking the soda. It looked like person-to-person transmission within families until they figured out it was coming from the soda cans and everybody in the family was drinking the same sodas.

62204475
>>62202000

Fpbp

62204543
>>62201978
>Load ze Hantavirus FUD

62204585
>>62201978
The virus has between a 2 week and 8 week incubation time.

It spreads by aerosol droplets.

The virus can remain virulent within a droplet for between 2 and 15 days.

It has a 40% rate of mortality.

This is not 'we treat you with a vaccine' shit. This is 'we shoot you and burn the body' shit.

You won't hear about the billionaires running into their bunkers. They'll be there long before things get hairy.

62204672
>>62204585
Nah. This is another hoax to get everyone to inject another mark of the beast into their arm. Fuck that. So fucking obvious and they aint fooling anybody after the 1st round.

62204681
>>62204672
Get the jab, schizo! You are killing people!!!

62204692
>>62204681
Fuck off. I took the covid vax and im not taking another

62204874
Whats with the nonstop pandemics? The last one was just 6 years ago. Why we getting literal viral plague now?

62204956
>>62204672
there's no rule that they have to do the same thing twice. It could be different.

62204967
>>62204874
Israel's pr department are desperate to change the topic

62204988
>>62204967
I suppose this is it. Another nothing burger vax forced upon me

62205070
>>62202033
>if it's even mildly transmissible without symptoms.
It's not transmissible while asymptomatic, it's extremely hard to catch it while symptomatic (onset is like the flu so it can happen, but requires a lot of fluids and isn't aerosolized).

If you actually want to doomsay then the real issues is if it gets into rodent populations then it's just a recurring issue.

62205228
>>62205070
Then kill the rodents whats the big deal?

62205278
Stop falling for /pol/ bot threads. No one else cares about it at all

62205340
>>62202909
So like a one week timeframe they changed to possible human transmission? Just like this thing lol

62205341
>>62205278
Good point desu

62205352
humanity exists for 300000 years and now all of a sudden we have global humanity ending pandemics back to back within just a few years. yeah this seems a LITTLE bit unlikely and no I wont stop noticing.

62205358
>>62205340
Correct, they only have so much information so "the story" will change the moment they get more.

There's nothing wrong with that besides being a retard who thinks that since something is "the facts" all other possibilities have been "deboonked".

If you have an IQ over 110 you should be able to see the situation as one of many possibilities of varying probabilities, and update your weightings as more information becomes available.

Again, highly likely it won't transmit well enough but keep your eyes peeled for new cases.

62206237
>>62204470
We've known about corona viruses for a long ass time too. There's only been so many cases of this strain ever documented

62206252
>>62205352
Covid and now this banter plague would barely register in history; big nothingburgers. Mass media and the feverish obsession with keeping boomers alive as long as possible is what made covid register as a black-death tier plague in our (well, just normies') minds.

62206383
>>62206252
Just looked up the numbers again to rage-bait myself:

>According to provisional CDC mortality data, COVID‑19 death rates per 100,000 population rise steeply with age, from under1 in young children to over 1,395 per100,000 in those aged 85+ in 2021.

Imagine you're in Europe or China in 300ad, or the middle ages, and suddenly some unknown fever goes around. Out of everyone that contracts this mysterious fever, not even 0.1% dies. Literally NO ONE would care, and rightly so. The Justinian plague had a survival rate of less than 50%, now that is a pandemic to write home about.

62206439
>>62202089
It's a nothing burger to prepare you for a somethingburger

How would humanity react if they found out about sars? Mpox? Ebola?

Write down the findings and data and then plan your depopulation event accordingly.

One thing I've noticed on goytok is that normies are showing high levels of apathy and vitriol towards the current hanta passengers. This is likely to prepare them mentally to accept the coming deaths of the future.

tl:dr when cows are led to the slaughter they might freak out and go crazy. Imagine leading billions of cows and you're in a time crunch.

62206650
>>62206383
I wish it was the boomer destroyer they hyped it up to be.

62206967
>>62206237
And this is one of the documented and well-studied strains of hanta. Do try to keep up.

item.title: The only IQ test that matters is whether you're smart enough to find a way out of waging, whether it's building and sell… — 37 replies — 4.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
The only IQ test that matters is whether you're smart enough to find a way out of waging, whether it's building and sell…

Open thread • Replies: 37 • Updated: 2026-05-08 12:50 UTC

OP

The only IQ test that matters is whether you're smart enough to find a way out of waging, whether it's building and selling a business, investing in the right assets, or getting rich from online content.Everything else is irrelevant.

Early replies (first 3)

62204408
having a job again would be pretty comfy though
I would even go into the office

62204412
pretty much, yea

62204418
Got a call for a job for which I have the certs about remote management. But they called 6 hours ago, I was going to call first thing in the morning so lol they probably won't even asnwer.

But in the 1% chance I get them on the line, force the recruiter to TALK ABOUT THAT JOB and refuse to send over my resume unless considered for that specific job and can get that job, the first step in my plan to work 3 remote jobs will be complete.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62204485
>>62204458

>Einstein
>Genius

This retard stole his wife’s work and couldn’t even write. Lmao

62204980
>>62204400
I 100% agree with this. The internet and technology has made this the easiest time to become rich ever just by virtue of the wealth of information at everybody's fingertips but the idiots use it just to complain about how hard they have it instead of trying literally anything to improve their situation.
I have offered to teach family members about how I made it (with stocks and option spreads) but they would not even try to learn. They just wanted to give me money and have me invest it for them.
I lost the last shred of sympathy I had for normies it would have been so easy to scam them out of all their hard wagied life-savings and they would have absolutely deserved it.

62204991
>>62204458
being a tenured professor with his reputation wasn't really a job but more of a playground for him to do whatever he wanted.

62204998
people will be like yeah im high iq then be a poor pathetic loser working some pleb brainlet job lmao

62205005
>>62204980
>I have offered to teach family members about how I made it (with stocks and option spreads) but they would not even try to learn. They just wanted to give me money and have me invest it for them.

assuming youre really successful and not LARPing, your family and friends are right to prefer you do it for them. it requires skills and a mentality that cant be taught. you must know theres many people that know more than you that have failed in the markets

62205044
>>62205005
I partially agree and disagree. I concur that while there are a myriad ways to make it like OP said there is a sort of "emotional detachment" mentality that will be immensely beneficial in all of them. While this may come easier to some people than others I absolutely refuse to believe that this state of mind and the associated skills cannot be taught. I see it merely as a matter of developing a habit, similar to regular working out or learning an instrument.
The most fundamental of all these habits if one of continuous learning. I tried pennystocks, daytrading, TA and various unlawful enterprises in order to make it before I found a niche in which I could consistently beat the market and I am still studying new strategies in an effort to diversify.
They however did not even want to start. It would have been perfectly fine if my investment strategies would have been too stressful or risky for their tastes but they never even engaged. They just expect someone else to do things while they watch TV and bitch about the current thing.

In one of the MITs courses they put on youtube about the service itself the professor stated that when universities started putting their lectures online for free they expected that underachieving/underprivileged students would get a leg up from them but instead the only ones who used them at all where already the top students/overachievers.
I have started to see the K-shape everywhere.

62205048
I can think of a lot of really smart engineers who would never be able to run a business to save their lives. I don't think of them as idiots.
Though they could probably hack it as quant traders if they felt like it, go independent that way.

62205049
>>62204400
>have to work to do any of that shit
can't escape
even investing in the right assets has psychological work. reassuring yourself you picked correctly...

62205173
>>62205044
>ways to make it
no such thing

62205197
>>62204980
Teach me, I'm willing to learn.

I understand the risks of options.

62205235
>>62205197
test

62205240
>>62204458
being an elite college professor isn't a real job. you aren't expected to teach, unless you want to. you're given grants gibs left and right to investigate whatever ideas you want. it's like being nobility.

62205246
>>62204980
>Just do something you don't want to do bro!!

It's as hard for me to invest in stocks or do YouTube or any of that boring shit as it would be to stack shelves or whatever. Arguably setting up a business or anything is 100x more boring and difficult than just stacking shelves

62205252
>>62204400
agree too. I managed to get my NW up to about $2 million,I only made it so far because of crypto, I never treated it like real money until I cashed out. I need around 2.8 to comfortably retire but I am such a pussy, I cannot take big risks, I am just too afraid. My plan is to put about 500k into some triple leveraged ETF the next time we get a bigger pullback. pls halp me make it as fast as possible I cannot tolerate waging anymore.

62205253
>>62204400
>The only IQ test that matters is
The #1 answer to this is experience of the Divine. This being the highest state of Knowing Thyself.

A distant #2 is being able to order one's obligation & success in the material world.

t. cagie hater

62205255
>>62205197
>>62205235
Ah shit my post didn't go through so I'll try again

Look up these terms first:
>Calls
>Puts
>Nakes/Covered
>Assignment
>Premium
>The greeks
>IV
>Maximum Pain
>Calender Spreads
>Rolling (the Wheel)

Stay within the risk you are comfortable with. Don't chase Premiums, it will get you burnt. Buy to close options you sold instead of letting them expire. Even if they expire worthless you will give up the time in the weekend if you don't roll them over.
Ex-Dividend Dates and earnings will greatly increase the chances of assignment, plan accordingly.

NEVER EVER SELL NAKED SHORTS!!! YOU WILL END UP LIKE MELVIN CAPITAL!

If you sell calls above your cost basis and puts below you will always make (some) money. If one end goes in the money you can roll them up or down to the nearest higher/lower price that will give you more premium than the buy to close price. This will give you more money and allow you to catch a potential move back to the mean, while rolling to the nearest out of the money price might leave you dry for months.

Some good resources here
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLOweupE79XXiBaeH_xBpkUcYUsrAaKQen
https://www.youtube.com/@BradFinn/videos

thetagang.com/
maximum-pain.com/

62205271
you guys hate waging because you have shitty entry level nigger tier humiliating jobs

62205275
>>62205271
I got a good job and after a couple of years even that becomes tedious. I do think it makes you appreciate time off more though

62205279
>>62205271
If you can't quit this job that you love tomorrow if you wanted to then you're still entry level at being in control of your life.

62205283
>>62205271
I got full WFH engineering job, I can do whatever I want I still hate it.

62205334
>>62204400
>be me
>never worked a day in my life
>the IQ move was to simply force the government to pay me a monthly wage for being mentally ill

62205339
>>62205253
This, finding God is real iq test. Anything else in life is a sidequest

62205388
>>62205173
Anyone 300+ living paycheck-to-paycheck is stupid. I don’t care if they’re a coastie, get a roommate like other people have to

62205395
>>62205275
>>62205279
>>62205283
Just put the fries in the bag

62205397
>>62204400
If you weren't part of the top 10% in 2025, you're lower class

62205405
>>62204400
What if I'm too strange to know what normal people like and do? How am I supposed to make something they want or predict what they're going to do next?

62205437
>>62205044
>>62205005
No they are not right. Investing for friends and family is a one way ticket to bitterness, resentment, and possibly even murder. If things don’t go as they expect, they will resent you. They need to be the ones taking responsibility for their financial decisions. It’s not something you can do for them. You can lead a horse to water, but you can’t make them drink.

62205464
>>62204458
>>62204485
Einstein was a fraud but also a genius. Only a genius could sell an absurd theorie to the world as supposed best Theorie about the universe and get away with it.

62205496
>>62205464
he was just jewish

62205505
>>62205464
theory that he stole from the french Henri Poincare
